title: [lichen_l2.c:244] peer_table static with CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_MAX_NEIGHBORS
description: Function: peer_table (module static). Thread safety: The peer_table array (line 244) is sized by CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_MAX_NEIGHBORS which defaults to 16 (line 41). If Kconfig is changed to a very large value, this consumes significant BSS space (each entry is 8+32+1=41 bytes minimum, so 16 entries = 656 bytes). Not a contract violation per se, but a capacity design decision. Additionally, the peer iteration in peer_try_all_pubkeys is O(n) which could be slow with many peers. Priority 3 - design note for scalability.
close_reason: Fixed: Added BUILD_ASSERTs to validate CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_MAX_NEIGHBORS bounds (4-64) at compile time, with documentation of memory constraints (~44 bytes/entry, ~2.8KB at max)
